mapper.insert: INSERT INTO goods_tag_category ( tag_name, tag_type, parent_tag_id, status, remark, created_by, created_time, level ) VALUES ( #{tagName}, #{tagType}, #{parentTagId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{createdTime}, #{level} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM goods_tag_category WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE goods_tag_category
tag_name = #{tagName},
tag_type = #{tagType},
parent_tag_id = #{parentTagId},
status = #{status},
remark = #{remark},
created_by = #{createdBy},
created_time = #{createdTime},
level = #{level},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM goods_tag_category WHERE parent_tag_id = #{parentId}
